findings.issue: Index builder fails due to AST parsing errors and skipped files; archived despite active dependency. INDEXED_PATHS includes 'apps/api/app' but parser breaks on syntax, returning empty.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/ and fix AST error handling to continue on failure. Validate all INDEXED_PATHS are readable and within project_root.

whistleblower_flag: Index is falsely reporting recent build while containing no data — creates critical blind spot in codebase awareness
